subcodes.first_line: O cherished handmaiden of God! Your letter was received. 'Abdu'l-Bahá is the Center of God's Covenant, but His Holiness [3.5s]... ...The Mashriqu’l-Adhkar is a divine edifice in this nether world and a means for attaining the oneness of humanity
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای کنیز عزیز الهی نامه تو رسید عبدالبهاء مرکز میثاق الهی است اما حضرت
subcodes.subjects: @House of Worship [Mashriqu'l-Adhkar], @station; mission; authority of Abdu'l-Baha, @unity; oneness of humanity
